author: w3Lb
content: Plan: audit + refresh the four READMEs (the crates.io landing pages) for 0.3.0. Found stale: main README CLI ref missing --threads and -p/--pipe, JSON docs missing atomic/record_undo, architecture said 'four crates' and omitted the facade; ripsed-fs claimed PID-based lock staleness (dead since 0.2.8's flock rewrite); ripsed-json advertised a 64MiB size limit that does not exist in the code; ripsed-core bullets predate multiline/counts/ranges/splice/prescreen/LineProcessor. Rewrite accordingly; docs-only commit.
